_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of the steps for release to higher levels of integration testing, certification activities, and/or operations using testbeds, modeling and simulation to synchronize software releases with the development of an operations environment(s) to ensure compatibility.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of model deployment strategies, including batch inference, real-time serving, edge deployment, A/B testing, canary releases, and shadow deployments, and the infrastructure requirements and failure modes of each.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI AI domain. AI-K-023 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-K-017 (AI, cosine: 0.611), TF-K-008 (TF, cosine: 0.572).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.1/10 (raw 0.514). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge, releases, testing]. DCWF-only terms [activities, certification, compatibility, development, ensure, environment] vs WIDAI-only terms [b, batch, canary, deployment, deployments, edge] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.857 (P=0.858, R=0.855). Balanced P/R — the 35-word DCWF element and 28-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.6%). "Knowledge of the steps for release to higher levels of integration testing, cert" and "Knowledge of model deployment strategies, including batch inference, real-time s" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.630 > STS 0.514 (gap +0.115). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [knowledge, releases, testing] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.0%. Shared tokens: [knowledge, releases, testing]. DCWF-only: [activities, certification, compatibility, development, ensure, environment]. WIDAI-only: [b, batch, canary, deployment, deployments, edge].

signals.detail: STS 0.514 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
